name: Produce Flame
description: A flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for the duration and harms neither you nor your equipment. The flame sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. As an action, you can hurl the flame at a creature within 30 feet, making a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 fire damage.
effect: While held, sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius; can be thrown as a ranged spell attack (range_long) dealing 1d8 fire damage.
notes: Dual use: light source (10-min) and throwable 1d8 fire attack (range 2 = 30 ft)
Primary shape = ranged spell attack; light is secondary utility effect
